title: Instagram Messaging API Setup Guide
description: Step-by-step troubleshooting guide for resolving Instagram Messaging API error #3 and permission issues in n8n workflows, helping developers properly configure app capabilities and authentication.
gumroad_description:
You've wasted hours staring at Instagram Messaging API error #3, and the official Meta docs aren't helping.

This guide cuts straight to the fix — walking you through the exact app capability settings, permission scopes, and n8n credential configuration that actually resolve the issue.

Who this is for:
— Developers building Instagram DM automations in n8n who keep hitting authentication walls
— Freelancers or agencies setting up client Instagram workflows and can't afford to lose billable hours debugging
— Builders who've read the Meta docs three times and still can't figure out why permissions aren't sticking

What's inside:
— A clear diagnosis of what error #3 actually means and why it triggers
— Step-by-step app capability configuration so you enable the right settings in the right order
— Permission scope checklist to stop missing the non-obvious requirements
— n8n-specific credential setup walkthrough that accounts for Instagram's quirks
— Quick-reference summary you can reuse every time you set up a new app

Stop burning time on a problem that has a known solution.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
